failure_reason: Moved the BML/Hati native compiler floor from named class dispatch to default class-instance records, arity-aware dispatch, and template/generic metadata. The focused proof returns 23 across Go/Rust/TypeScript and binary artifact mode; floor proof returns 24; bml-generics-band remains 16777215; prior class dispatch remains 17; full Form validation returns fourth arm: 138 band(s) four-way, 559 ok, and 0 divergent. The metal-plane audit passes Form-native CPU/GPU/ML, lowered JIT, oracle learning, macOS arm64 Mach-O receipts, and Android arm64 ELF receipts. The new BML/Hati proof is 3-kernel only because fourth-arm mutable record admission for this proof family remains a named gap.
